name: Python Basics
goal: Write and understand fundamental Python programs
units: Unit 1: Variables and Data Types - integers, floats, strings, booleans
Unit 2: Control Flow - if/elif/else, comparison operators
Unit 3: Loops - for loops, while loops, range, break, continue
Unit 4: Functions - def, parameters, return values, scope
Unit 5: Lists and Tuples - indexing, slicing, mutation, iteration
Unit 6: Dictionaries and Sets - key-value pairs, common methods
Unit 7: File I/O - open, read, write, context managers
Unit 8: Modules and Imports - stdlib basics, pip packages
